headline: Is Coinbase Global (COIN) Overvalued After Cybersecurity Jitters And Recent Share Price Moves
summary: Coinbase Global overview and recent performance snapshot Coinbase Global (COIN) has drawn investor attention after recent share price moves, with the stock last closing at US$202.91 and showing mixed returns over the past year and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Coinbase Global. The recent 5.01% 7 day and 22.22% 30 day share price returns contrast with a weaker 90 day share price return of 17.22% and a 3 year total shareholder return of 206.05%.
